message: torch 2.6+ requires cuDNN 9 (libcudnn.so.9) which is not available in the environment

evidence.error_log: ImportError: libcudnn.so.9: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory
evidence.root_cause: torchaudio<2.9 downgrade triggered torch downgrade which requires newer cuDNN

mitigation_options: Use CPU-only versions of torch and torchaudio
Pin to specific torch/torchaudio versions compatible with system CUDA
